name: pre-commit: pre-commit-hooks.yaml is valid YAML and conforms to pre-commit framework schema (id, name, entry, language, files)
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'YAML.load_file(ARGV[0])' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/ci/pre-commit-hooks.yaml" && for k in id name entry language; do grep -E "^- $k:|^  $k:" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/ci/pre-commit-hooks.yaml" >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL $k missing" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
